changes: Added `probe: bool` field to Provider struct with doc comment explaining air-gapped deployment use case
Added `default_probe()` helper function returning true as custom default value
Added `is_true()` predicate function for skip_serializing_if to omit default values from serialization
Updated three Provider construction sites: seed_providers (2 instances) and test fixtures (1 instance)
file_insights.serde_pattern: Uses #[serde(default = "default_probe", skip_serializing_if = "is_true")] for backwards-compatible optional serialization
file_insights.scope: Configuration struct supporting optional feature control

patterns_discovered.description: Combining #[serde(default = "fn")] with skip_serializing_if for fields that serialize only when non-default
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintains backwards compatibility while reducing config file verbosity

patterns_discovered.description: When adding a field to a configuration struct, update: (1) struct definition, (2) seed/factory function, (3) test fixtures
patterns_discovered.coverage: All three visible locations were updated in this change

patterns_discovered.description: Using separate named functions (is_true) instead of inline logic for serialization predicates improves readability

gotchas_discovered.risk: Medium - Only 3 constructor sites updated (seed_providers x2, tests x1); other factory methods or macro-generated code may exist outside this diff
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Recommend grepping for 'Provider {' or similar patterns to ensure all construction sites were found

gotchas_discovered.risk: Low - Function is not complex but slightly counter-intuitive: returns true when field is default (for skipping), which means false values serialize
Low - 'air-gapped deployments' is contextual; unclear what 'probe' actually does without seeing caller code
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Cross-reference with code that reads and acts on this field

discoveries.approach_rationale: Straightforward field addition using established serde patterns. All visible constructor sites were systematically updated. No compile errors indicated.

recommendations.action: Verify no other Provider constructors exist
recommendations.reason: grep -r 'Provider {' to ensure coverage beyond the 3 sites in this diff

recommendations.action: Add probe field to any Provider builder/factory methods if they exist
recommendations.reason: Prevents downstream compilation failures if fluent constructors exist

recommendations.action: Consider refactoring is_true as inline closure
recommendations.reason: Not critical; current form is clear and reusable if pattern repeats

recommendations.action: Confirm probe field usage in provider adapter launch code
recommendations.reason: Understand how/where connectivity probing is gated by this boolean
